stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Which approach can be expected and what hazards are given in the CPDLC message?

options.b: Expect an ILS approach for Runway 18 and birds in the vicinity.
options.c: Expect a Localiser approach for Runway 18 and light wind shear on the final approach.
options.d: Expect a Localiser approach for Runway 18, birds in the vicinity and moderate wind shear on the final approach.
